IDENTITY: Candidate Profile (18827609.pdf)
SUMMARY: Enthusiastic and goal-oriented HR Professional with 3+ years experience driving innovation and strategy for a global technology organization. Excellent reputation for proactively resolving problems, communicating effectively, and driving overall operational improvements.
SKILLS: Recruiting, Onboarding, Project Management, Event Planning, Employee Relations, Teamwork/Collaboration, Training and Development, Public Speaking, Social Media Marketing, ADP, Workday, Microsoft Office Suite
